calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2004 Off Calendar

Compromise Of Incompetent Person In Scd.
Off Calendar May-21-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing on Compromise of Incompetent Person

Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Lavon Granger.
David A. Krausz, Esq. For Petitioner: Peter Guo Cai Wu present as guardian ad litem for Lian Jie Zhou an incompetent Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Total Settlement: $1,350,000.00

Medical expenses of $66,493.41.
Attorney fees $563,617.97
Other Payments $81,000.00 (to Zhao Zhen Wu/loss of consortium claim)
Total fees and expenses $711,112.38

The balance of $638,887.62 will be deposited as follows:
$104,967.62 into bank account "Conservatorship of Lian Jie Zhou, Peter Guo Cai Wu, conservator, Bank of America Account #02790-10217
The rest by periodic payments made to Lian Jie Zhou in the amount of $4,000,00 per month starting on 15/May/04 (Present value is $533,920.00)
See order for details.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-06-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Aug-03-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 613

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Each counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set due to the proximity of trial date. Proceedings reported by Lesley Sette, CSR #10580. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2003 Set For Trial On May-17-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Apr-26-04 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 613
